title: Player Bot Datapack V-1.1
description: This datapack adds realistic bots to minecraft.
body:
## This datapack adds a posibility to create a bot that replicates player's movement and actions.

Current Version: V-1.1 Combat & Logic Update.
Main features: Logic improvement, Greater combat support, Utilities & tools for bots.

### You can watch what this bot can do in these videos:  

**V-1.1 Guide:**
